messages.body:
Unit 4 at 11963 Walnut has a leaking kitchen faucet. I found Angel Plumbing as the best fit.

Should I send them?

messages.body: Hi Maria, we received your request about the leaking kitchen faucet. We are assigning a plumber and they will contact you to coordinate access.

original_messages.body: Hi Maria, we received your request about the leaking kitchen faucet. We are assigning a plumber and they will contact you to coordinate access.

messages.body: Can you take a look at a leaking kitchen faucet at 11963 Walnut, Unit 4? Tenant is Maria Lopez. Please coordinate access with the tenant and update us after diagnosis.

messages.body: Just to confirm, did you mean the Walnut faucet work order or the Primrose toilet leak?
